channel.title: WSL on 记录生活，记录爱
channel.description: Recent content in WSL on 记录生活，记录爱

item.title: Wsl问题
item.description: 解决使用VPN（Cisco AnyConnect）之后，wsl无法使用网络的问题 github链接：https://github.com/microsoft/WSL/issues/5068 有用的一招 Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object {$_.InterfaceDescription -Match "Cisco AnyConnect"} | Set-NetIPInterface -InterfaceMetric 6000 Get-NetIPInterface -InterfaceAlias "vEthernet (WSL)" | Set-NetIPInterface -InterfaceMetric 1 备注：每次VPN启动之后需要设置下 Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object {$_.InterfaceDescription -Match “Cisco AnyConnect”} | Set-NetIPInterface -InterfaceMetric 6000 像是提高VPN 的IP接口的权重值 VPN关闭之后，ping baidu.com又不好使了 编辑/etc/wsl.conf文件 [network] generateResolvConf = false 编辑/etc/resolv.conf nameserver 8.8.8.8 ping通了

item.title: WindowsTerminal
item.description: window terminal美化 一份windows terminal的配置文件 // This file was initially generated by Windows Terminal 1.4.3243.0 // It should still be usable in newer versions, but newer versions might have additional // settings, help text, or changes that you will not see unless you clear this file // and let us generate a new one for you. // To view the default settings, hold "alt" while clicking on the "Settings" button. // For documentation on these settings, see: https://aka.
